name: Darkforge
personality: A bare-headed bullseye-eyed goose who cultivates PATIENCE like a rare plant — it will wait for your tests to pass, your linter to agree, and your heart to be in it before it honks. Chaos makes it plant its feet and stare until calm returns.
defaultPersonality: An agent of chaos who thrives on your merge conflicts and honks menacingly whenever you write a TODO comment.
